svg.title: Nav rail from screenshot explained
svg.desc: Exact icons from the Stitch screenshot with explanations
svg.text: Org avatar — "H" for Hivespace
Top-level org. Click to switch org or see org settings.
Home
Personal dashboard — your tasks, recent activity, what needs attention today.
Tasks / Board active now
Kanban board you see on screen. Red dot = urgent unread item.
Inbox
All notifications — mentions, task updates, PR reviews, sprint alerts.
Members / Teams
View org members, teams, roles. Invite people or manage access.
Chat
Channels, threads, DMs. #backend-ops and #design-sync visible in sidebar.
Docs / Knowledge base
Rich text pages, nested docs, graph view. Scoped per project or workspace.
GitHub
PRs, commits, linked issues. PR-1254 shown in task detail panel on screen.
Email V2
Work inbox (Gmail/Outlook) inside Hivespace. Phase 5 feature.
Settings
Org config, billing, integrations, roles, GitHub OAuth connection.
Your profile
Account preferences, theme, logout, switch between orgs you belong to.
